# Q14 top-N by computed ratio (sort+limit) with avg/max context (data exfil volume)

**Dataset**: `gx_07_flows` (synthetic scenario lab dataset — the technique transfers to your real datasets)

Data-exfiltration by volume — rank egress by bytes moved per host/destination. Q14 top-N by computed ratio (sort+limit) with avg/max context.

```sql
dataset = gx_07_flows | comp sum(bytes_out) as total_out, sum(bytes_in) as total_in, avg(bytes_out) as avg_out, max(bytes_out) as peak_out by host | filter total_in > 0 | alter ratio = round(multiply(divide(to_float(total_out), to_float(total_in)), 100)) | filter ratio > 5000 | sort desc ratio | limit 3 | fields host, total_out, total_in, avg_out, peak_out, ratio
```

_Live-verified on a real XSIAM tenant (returned 3). From the 20-scenario XQL coverage program; technique is dataset-portable._
